title: Get details of a certain tag
body:
Hello,

I would like to get certain info of a tag, e.g. debian:bullseye-slim
Using `skopeo inspect docker://docker.io/debian:bullseye-slim` returns all tags and other info

<details>
  <summary>Output</summary>

```
skopeo inspect docker://docker.io/debian:bullseye-slim
```

comments.body:
Thanks for reaching out.

What exactly do you mean by “certain info”? We can’t very well discuss whether “certain info” is available without being more precise about that.

(The tag list can be disabled nowadays using an option.)

Hello,
Indeed I will give you a small example.
When we open https://registry.hub.docker.com/v2/repositories/library/debian/tags?page_size=100 and search for bullseye-slim we will get following infos:

Then you can use jq to filter certain keys

“e.g.” does not help prioritize. What data do you _need_?

(In recent versions, size is reported per layer in `layerData`. Architecture is already included in individual per-arch inspects. For multi-arch, that’s tracked in #1283 .)
Also note that some of the data above (e.g. timestamps) is inherently registry-collected and registry-specific, and not available in the cross-vendor API.

> “e.g.” does not help prioritize. What data do you _need_?
> 
> (In recent versions, size is reported per layer in `layerData`. Architecture is already included in individual per-arch inspects. For multi-arch, that’s tracked in #1283 .)

I would like to have digest of tags
Isn’t that already available as the very second item?

No, when you compare the digest on https://hub.docker.com/layers/library/debian/bullseye-slim/images/sha256-76cdda8fe5eb597ef5e712e4c9a9f5f1fb119e69f353daaa7bd6d0f6e66e541d?context=explore its a different one
Seems `sha256:e8ad0bc7d0ee6afd46e904780942033ab83b42b446b58efa88d31ecf3adf4678` is the 'main' one and each arch have its own
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
#1283 is tracing the RFE to list included architectures / variants.
